summary: Static packet for climate-policy prompts. It supports role tests around source discipline, incentive rules, and policy tradeoffs.

sources.title: EPA climate change and greenhouse gas information
claims: Climate policy can involve emissions rules, energy systems, adaptation, public health, transportation, and industrial policy.
Official climate regulatory details require current EPA or agency verification.

sources.title: Department of Energy clean energy and affordability frame
claims: Energy policy debates often combine emissions, reliability, affordability, industrial competitiveness, and local implementation concerns.
Incentives and deadlines can change and should be checked against official program pages.
sources.notes: Packet does not include live incentive eligibility.
